title: Kreuztaler Werkstatt
description: Website für eine Autowerkstatt mit Geschichte seit 1946
fullDescription:
Client: full-service auto repair shop, Kreuztal, Germany
Stack: Python / Flask, responsive layout, Telegram Bot API, interactive booking calendar

[Link](http://www.kreuztaler-werkstatt.de)

The Challenge

To build a modern website for a family-run auto repair shop with 80 years of history. Not just a business card — but a living working tool that saves the owner's time, reduces the workload on staff, and turns a casual website visitor into a booked client.



What Was Built

Instant Telegram notifications. The moment a client submits a booking request, the owner receives a message directly on their phone. Name, contact details, service, date and time — all in one message, no need to check email or open a laptop. A new booking in your pocket — literally.


Smart calendar with full control. Through the admin panel, the owner flexibly manages the schedule: blocking specific dates — holidays, vacations, technical days — or closing individual time slots within the working day. Clients only see genuinely available times and cannot book into blocked slots.

2.png
Client database always at hand. The admin panel contains the complete booking history: who booked, when, for which service, along with contact details. A clean table with filters by date and service type. No more paper journals, no more digging through emails — everything in one place, accessible at any time.

1.png
Automatic reminders for clients. One day before the appointment, each client automatically receives an email reminder. Forgotten appointments and empty slots in the schedule become a thing of the past. The client arrives prepared, the owner without unpleasant surprises.


11 services with descriptions and photos. From diagnostics and engine repair to tyre service and bodywork — each service is presented as an individual card with a photo and detailed description.

3.png
Company history since 1946. A visual timeline gallery with archival and modern photographs. Eight decades of experience — not empty words, but living images that build trust at first glance.


Customer reviews with a rating of 4.8/5 based on 127 reviews, integrated with Google and Facebook.


Compliance with German law — Impressum, Datenschutzerklärung (GDPR), terms of use, cookie banner. Fully legally compliant, zero risk.



The Result

While the workshop is closed — the website is working. While the owner is under a car — the phone has already received a new booking. While the client hasn't yet remembered their appointment — the reminder has already been sent. The website doesn't just represent the business, it actively participates in its work every single day.
